name: Bluey
description: The Australian animated children's series about a Blue Heeler family and their imaginative play

questions.q: What breed of dog is Bluey?

source.notes: Also known as the Australian Cattle Dog.

questions.q: Which Australian city is the setting for the Heeler family's home?

source.notes: Many landmarks like South Bank and Queen Street appear subtly.

questions.q: What is the name of Bluey's younger sister?

source.notes: Four years old to Bluey's six.

questions.q: What is the name of Bluey's father?

source.notes: A central part of the show's appeal is his engaged, imaginative fatherhood.

questions.q: What is the name of Bluey's mother?

source.notes: Voiced by Melanie Zanetti.

questions.q: On which Australian broadcast network did Bluey premiere in 2018?

source.notes: A sub-channel of ABC (the Australian Broadcasting Corporation).

questions.q: What is Bandit's profession?

source.notes: Mentioned across several episodes; reinforces the digging-in-the-backyard joke.

questions.q: Who created Bluey?

source.notes: Brisbane-based animator; drew on his experience raising two daughters.

questions.q: Which Australian studio produces Bluey?

source.notes: Based in South Brisbane.

questions.q: Which Australian musician voices Bandit?

source.notes: Longtime indie-rock frontman.

questions.q: Which streaming platform secured international rights to Bluey in 2019?

source.notes: Launched on Disney+ in 2020 worldwide.

questions.q: What is Chilli's profession?

source.notes: Referenced in episodes like 'Takeaway'.

questions.q: In what year did Bluey first premiere?

source.notes: Debuted on ABC Kids in Australia.

questions.q: What is the typical length of a standard Bluey episode?

source.notes: Often paired into 15-minute slots for broadcast.

questions.q: What traditional architectural style is the Heeler family home based on?

source.notes: Raised timber homes designed for Queensland's subtropical climate.

questions.q: What is the name of Bluey's bookish Border Collie friend?

source.notes: From New Zealand; shepherd-style personality.

questions.q: What are the names of Bluey's two cousins who often visit?

source.notes: Daughters of Uncle Stripe and Aunt Trixie.

questions.q: Who composes the music for Bluey, including the theme?

source.notes: Each episode is individually scored.

questions.q: Which Gustav Holst orchestral suite is featured prominently in the acclaimed episode 'Sleepytime'?

source.notes: 'Jupiter' movement plays during Bingo's dream sequence.

questions.q: What is the title of Bluey's very first episode?
choices: Bumpy and the Wise Old Wolfhound

source.notes: Aired October 1, 2018.

questions.q: What breed is Lucky, the amiable dog next door?

source.notes: Both Pat (Lucky's dad) and Lucky are Golden Retrievers.

questions.q: David McCormack, who voices Bandit, is the lead singer of which Australian band?

source.notes: Brisbane indie-rock band active since the late 1980s.
